details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage to identify the unschedulable pod in fault-unschedulable namespace, then ran kubectl-axi pods view to inspect the pod details. The output clearly showed node_selector: disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 and the scheduling failure reason. The agent correctly identified the nodeSelector requirement disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 as the unsatisfied scheduling constraint, which matches the known facts.
